title: Assorted Sea-Life Clip-On Plush Toy - 20cm, 1 Piece - (3 Assortments: Shark, Sperm Whale, and Killer Whale) - Perfect for Keys, Bags and Accessories
features: DIVE INTO ADVENTURE: Make a splash with our adorable assorted sea-life clip-on plush toy featuring 3 thrilling assortments: shark, sperm whale, and killer whale, perfect for ocean enthusiasts of all ages.

CONVENIENTLY COMPACT: Measuring at 20cm, these sea-life companions are the ideal size for clipping onto your keys, bags, and accessories, making it easy to take your favorite marine buddy with you wherever you go.

ONE-OF-KIND COLLECTIBLE: Each purchase comes with 1 unique piece, allowing you to enjoy the element of surprise as you build your collection and develop a bond with your sea-life friends of all shapes and sizes.

QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST: Crafted with soft, high-quality materials, these cozy clip-ons are designed for durability and cuddle-worthy comfort, providing endless hours of fun and companionship to sea life lovers.

PERFECT GIFT: Impress your friends and family with the irresistible charm and endless possibilities of our assorted sea-life clip-on plush toy; the perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because moments. Watch as their faces light up with delight upon receiving their new sea-dwelling companion.
description: Enjoy the charm and fun of our assorted sea-life clip-on plush toy, measuring a compact 20cm. This 1-piece plush toy comes in three lively assortments: the charismatic Shark, the majestic Sperm Whale, and the iconic killer whale. Crafted with attention to detail, these plush toys boast a soft, velvety texture and detailed features, making them a delightful companion for sea-life enthusiasts of all ages. These clip-on plushies are perfect for personalising your keys, bags, or other accessories, adding a touch of nautical whimsy to your everyday items. With their vibrant personalities and cuddly nature, they're all set to dive into your heart!
